heading: Little Calumet River and Burns/Portage Waterway
label: 460u–24 Little Calumet River and Burns/Portage Waterway
notes: Amendments2019—Subsec. (a). , substituted “National Park” for “National Lakeshore”.Pub. L. 116–6, § 115(a)(1)(A)Subsec. (b). , substituted “Park” for “lakeshore” in two places.Pub. L. 116–6, § 115(a)(1)(B)

Change of NameCommittee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the House of Representatives changed to Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives on , by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Third Congress.Jan. 5, 1993
amendments: Amendments2019—Subsec. (a). , substituted “National Park” for “National Lakeshore”.Pub. L. 116–6, § 115(a)(1)(A)Subsec. (b). , substituted “Park” for “lakeshore” in two places.Pub. L. 116–6, § 115(a)(1)(B)

children.heading: Cooperative agreement
children.label: a Cooperative agreement
children.text: The Secretary may enter into a cooperative agreement with the Little Calumet River Basin Development Commission, the State of Indiana or any political subdivision thereof for the planning, management, and interpretation of recreational facilities on the tract within the boundaries of Indiana Dunes National Park identified as tract numbered 09–177 or on lands under the jurisdiction of the State of Indiana or political subdivision thereof along the Little Calumet River and Burns Waterway. The cooperative agreement may include provision for the planning of public facilities for boating, canoeing, fishing, hiking, bicycling, and other compatible recreational activities. Any recreational developments on lands under the jurisdiction of the National Park Service planned pursuant to this cooperative agreement shall be in a manner consistent with the purposes of this subchapter, including .1section 460u–6(b) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “09–117”.1

children.heading: Study
children.label: b Study
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct a study regarding the options available for linking the portions of the Park which are divided by the Little Calumet River and Burns/Portage Waterway so as to coordinate the management and recreational use of the Park. The Secretary shall submit the results of the study to the Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the United States House of Representatives and the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the United States Senate within two years after . Effective , there is authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for the purposes of conducting the study.October 29, 1986October 1, 1986
